## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::WifiPen;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        WifiPen { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
edit, wifi, pen, change, network

## Categories
connectivity, devices
